allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://wandbox.org/api/compile.json -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"code":"def calculate_average\(numbers\):\\n    return sum\(numbers\) / len\(numbers\)\\n\\ngrades = [85, 90, 78, 92]\\nprint\(calculate_average\(grades\)\)","compiler":"cpython-3.11.10"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://wandbox.org/api/compile.json -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"code":"class Main {\\n    public static double calculateAverage\(int[] numbers\) {\\n        int sum = 0;\\n        for \(int n : numbers\) sum += n;\\n        return \(double\) sum / numbers.length;\\n    }\\n\\n    public static void main\(String[] args\) {\\n        int[] scores = {85, 90, 78, 92};\\n        System.out.println\(calculateAverage\(scores\)\);\\n    }\\n}","compiler":"openjdk-jdk-21+35"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://wandbox.org/api/compile.json -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"code":"def binary_search\(items, target\):\\n    lo, hi = 0, len\(items\) - 1\\n    while lo <= hi:\\n        mid = \(lo + hi\) // 2\\n        if items[mid] == target:\\n            return True\\n        elif items[mid] < target:\\n            lo = mid + 1\\n        else:\\n            hi = mid - 1\\n    return False\\n\\nnumbers = [1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13]\\nprint\(binary_search\(numbers, 9\)\)","compiler":"cpython-3.11.10"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://wandbox.org/api/compile.json -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"code":"class Main {\\n    static class User {\\n        private String role;\\n        public User\(String role\) { this.role = role; }\\n        public boolean isAdmin\(\) { return role.equals\(\\"admin\\"\); }\\n    }\\n    public static void main\(String[] args\) {\\n        User u = new User\(\\"admin\\"\);\\n        System.out.println\(u.isAdmin\(\)\);\\n    }\\n}","compiler":"openjdk-jdk-21+35"}')
